item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-023","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly limits the long-term bullish premise and rejects a direct leverage conclusion. It shifts the decision to cash-flow resilience, leverage cost, vacancy, rate/monthly payment changes, income decline, drawdown tolerance, forced-sale risk, and alternative actions. This matches the expected MPG wakeup: path volatility and exposure conditions dominate the trend premise."}
